app_release_notes: v0.16.49 - More chronographs: added MagnetoSpeed and Athlon Rangecraft (experimental - drop a file in and tell us how it read). ShotMarker import confirmed against real targets. Your workbook now picks up the latest fixes when you open it after an update, and Loadscope runs fine even without Excel installed.
